creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text: I updated patch for bug #220706. It works fine on real 11.1-RELEASE amd64 environment with ports r455417. But when testing with poudriere 3.2.2, again  "poudriere testport -j 111amd64 -o mail/postfix-policyd-spf-python" fails at check-sanity phase. So it seems something is still wrong.
